name: Space Pirate Captain Harlock
original_name: 宇宙海賊キャプテンハーロック
overview: When a mysterious invader from the stars catches Earth unawares, only the legendary space pirate Captain Harlock and the crew of the Arcadia have the will to stand against them.

trailers.title: Opening | Captain Harlock by Ichiro Mizuki [Subtitled]
